title: Cozy Christmas Survival
description: Cozy Christmas Survival turns your Minecraft world into a snowy, cozy place, perfect for the Christmas spirit.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fee377634970982c2e193974f35193f65ba4faaa.png)

Step into a magical winter world with the Christmas Cozy modpack! Turn your adventure into a true Christmas tale ✨❄️

### **_Game Features_**
### 
> 🌨️ The entire world is covered with realistic, enhanced snow, creating full winter immersion !
> 
> 🎁 New resource packs bring cozy and festive textures, perfect for the holiday season !
> 
> 🌬️ Updated winter weather: snowstorms, gentle gusts, and falling snowflakes 🌨️
> 
> 🎄 Christmas decorations: trees, garlands, presents, and sparkling lights to brighten up your builds.
> 
> 💫 Realistic shaders and visual effects: dynamic snowflakes, light reflections, and a warm atmosphere !

- 📥 How to Install
  
Modrinth: download via the official Modrinth app

🎅🏻 Christmas Cozy promises an unforgettable winter adventure where every game is filled with the spirit of the season. Get ready to explore a magical snowy kingdom!
![have fun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58eb2eddbefb2b64f6d93d57cf1818cc9160d3a9.png)
